cross_scene_arcs.title: Evolving Relationship with Landon Carter
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rev. Sullivan initially warns Landon to stay away, then permits his relationship with Jamie under conditions, later confronts him over Jamie's illness, shares his past to form an alliance, and eventually officiates their wedding with a distant reunion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Adversarial stance towards Landon, aiming to prevent interaction with Jamie.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Allies with Landon, having officiated his wedding to Jamie, but relationship becomes distant over time.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The reason for Landon's later visit is unclear; their bond has weakened.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Navigating Fatherhood and Jamie's Illness
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rev. Sullivan restricts Jamie's social life, urges her to disclose her illness, faces her anger and withdrawal, witnesses her decline, and ultimately reconciles by admitting past errors and offering comfort.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Controlling father prioritizing safety over Jamie's independence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reconciled and supportive, having apologized and committed to being with her.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jamie's illness progresses, but the emotional conflict is resolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Annoyance to Love
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jamie's relationship with Landon evolves from causing annoyance to defining him as an enemy per her life list, then bonding over personal losses, sharing a public kiss, and declaring love with a wish to marry.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Landon is initially annoyed by Jamie's actions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jamie and Landon are in love and aspire to marry in spring.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Facing Mortality with Support
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jamie reveals her terminal leukemia, struggles with anger towards her father and God, expresses fear, receives Landon's promise of support, is hospitalized, shares her mother's book, and marries Landon in a wheelchair.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jamie is secretly ill and avoiding treatment disclosure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jamie is married to Landon but physically exhausted and hospitalized.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The financial cost of home care remains a barrier.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Adhering to a Life List
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jamie follows her life list by befriending Landon as an enemy and aspiring to marry in April, and she shares her mother's book of quotes as part of her personal legacy.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jamie has a life list with specific rules.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jamie has partially fulfilled her list and passed on a meaningful item.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The complete life list and other rules are not disclosed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Path to Re-enrollment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landon is expelled, agrees to re-enrollment conditions including drama club, and admits he needs Jamie's help to succeed in the play, shifting from defiance to responsibility.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Conditionally re-enrolled and vulnerable, acknowledging dependence on others
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Strained relationship with his father, as hinted during the re-enrollment discussion.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Enemies to Lovers
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landon and Jamie's relationship evolves from adversarial to romantic, deepening through a genuine kiss on stage, facing a crisis with Jamie's leukemia revelation, and culminating in Landon's proposal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Adversarial, with Jamie labeling Landon an enemy
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engaged, with Landon committed to supporting Jamie
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to handle Jamie's terminal illness in their future together.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Marriage and Closure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landon marries Jamie despite her illness, and years later as a widower, he honors her wish by returning his wedding ring and preparing to remarry, finding emotional closure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ready to remarry, having processed grief and received validation from Reverend Sullivan
